_note: Verified Minecraft 26.1.1 reference data. Used by tools.js for name resolution. Expand as needed.

structures._note: Valid IDs for /place structure and /locate structure

block_renames._note: Old name → current valid name. Applied automatically by bisect.js normalizer.

block_groups._note: Shorthand names resolved by tools.js replace_blocks_in_area

locate_targets._note: Natural language → /locate command mapping. Used by tools.js locate_and_teleport.
locate_targets.fortress: execute in minecraft:the_nether run locate structure minecraft:fortress
locate_targets.nether fortress: execute in minecraft:the_nether run locate structure minecraft:fortress
locate_targets.bastion: execute in minecraft:the_nether run locate structure minecraft:bastion_remnant
locate_targets.end city: execute in minecraft:the_end run locate structure minecraft:end_city
locate_targets.soul sand valley: execute in minecraft:the_nether run locate biome minecraft:soul_sand_valley
locate_targets.crimson forest: execute in minecraft:the_nether run locate biome minecraft:crimson_forest
locate_targets.warped forest: execute in minecraft:the_nether run locate biome minecraft:warped_forest
locate_targets.basalt deltas: execute in minecraft:the_nether run locate biome minecraft:basalt_deltas

features._note: All 221 configured features from Paper 26.1.1 jar. Use with /place feature minecraft:<name>

structures_flat._note: All 34 structures. Use with /place structure or /locate structure

blocks_note: 1166 blocks from MC 1.21.11 (99%+ overlap with 26.1.1). Used for validation.
